posts.author: Sarah_Westbridge_Updates
posts.text: Has anyone checked this viral video? It's supposed to be footage from our annual community festival, but something feels off about the audio and lip-sync. I've seen similar edits before where they swap in a different event entirely. The captions claim it's 'unprecedented chaos' but the background noise doesn't match the claimed location at all. [link removed] #CommunityFestival
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist verification due to potential synthetic manipulation of media and misleading context.
